programmes.show_description: BBC Radio Ulster joins BBC Radio 5 live.
The day's news agenda set with Sarah Brett and Chris Buckler, including regular news, travel and sport updates and analysis of finance and business news.
Breaking news and hard-hitting talk - Stephen Nolan gets you talking about the big stories of the day.
From the kitchen to the office, the work van and beyond... This is YOUR mid-morning escape, with Vinny & Cate.
The latest national and international news.
Join the conversation on the news stories everyone is talking about. William Crawley debates challenging issues and talks to the people making the headlines.
The wee man from Strabane presents the best of his popular country music collection and is happy to play your requests.
The latest national and international news.
Spend your afternoon with Peter Cinnamond with great music, craic and stories to make you smile.
All the day's news and analysis with Richard Morgan. Discussing stories that matter to you and asking the questions you want answered.
The latest national and international news.
Anne-Marie brings you a lively selection of music this Easter Tuesday. Music from Maximo Park, Ed Sheeran and Blondie. An easy guess who's on the Set List tonight...
Léargas ar an teicneolaíocht chúnta atá ar fáil i nGaeilge.
The latest national and international news.
Ralph celebrates Ards International Guitar Festival as it turns 30.
The latest national and international news.
